docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT QUINN, DAMIEN
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-15-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DOHERTY, TREVOR C/O TREVOR DOHERTY ELECTRIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT QUINN, DAMIEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED JUDGMENT FOR THE CLAIM INVOLVED IN THIS ACTION. SEE CSM FILED MAY 11, 2010 # CSM - 10-833720. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO: ENVELOPE MARKED FORWARD TIME EXPIRED. AS TO DEFENDANT QUINN, DAMIEN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED DEC-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINN, DAMIEN
